devdoc.author: OpenAI
devdoc.details: This contract demonstrates sealed bidding, role-based access control, state-driven workflow enforcement, and auditability for academic use.

acceptAdminRole().details: Must be called by the pending admin address.

params._inspectionReportHash: Hash of the inspection or acceptance report.

createTenderWithLocalTime(string,string,.details: Improves usability by converting human-readable local time into Unix time internally.

params._contractAmount: Payment amount to be released after acceptance.
params._utcOffsetHours: UTC offset in hours (e.g. 3 for EAT).

evaluateTender().details: Simplified prototype logic: lowest responsive revealed bid wins.

returns.descriptions: Registered bidder descriptions or company names.
returns.indexes: Sequential indexes of bidders in bidderList.

returns.valid: Whether the bid is considered valid.

returns.statusText: Human-readable name of the current tender stage.

getDeliveryEvidenceHashWithLocalTime(str.details: This helper improves usability by allowing only the current winner to hash delivery evidence references consistently.

params._documentType: Type of evidence document (e.g. DeliveryNote, Invoice, GRN).
params._referenceNumber: Reference number of the evidence document.
params._utcOffsetHours: UTC offset in hours (e.g. 3 for EAT).

returns.deliveryEvidenceComputedHash: keccak256 hash of document type, reference number, and timestamp.
returns.evidenceTimestamp: Unix timestamp computed from the provided local date and time.

getInspectionReportHashWithLocalTime(str.details: This helper improves usability by allowing only the assigned inspector to hash inspection references consistently.

params._documentType: Type of inspection document (e.g. InspectionReport, AcceptanceCertificate, VerificationNote).
params._referenceNumber: Reference number of the inspection document.
params._reportHour: Inspection report date hour in 24-hour format.
params._utcOffsetHours: UTC offset in hours (e.g. 3 for EAT).

returns.inspectionReportComputedHash: keccak256 hash of document type, reference number, and timestamp.
returns.reportTimestamp: Unix timestamp computed from the provided local date and time.

returns.lowestBidAmount: The lowest revealed valid bid amount.
returns.lowestBidderDescription: Description or company name of the lowest bidder.

getSealedBidHash(uint256,string).details: This helper is restricted to registered bidders for clearer procurement workflow control.

params._secret: Secret phrase used for bid commitment.

returns._0: The keccak256 packed hash of amount and secret.

returns.submissionDeadlineTimestamp: Raw Unix timestamp for the submission deadline.

returns.currentWinnerDescription: Description or company name of the current winner.
returns.submissionDeadlineTimestamp: Raw Unix timestamp for the submission deadline.
returns.title: Tender title.

params._bidder: Address of the supplier allowed to participate.

params._secret: Secret string originally used to generate the sealed hash.

setInspector(address).details: Inspector can be changed only before final inspection/payment stages.

returns.currentStatus: Current lifecycle stage as enum value.
returns.currentStatusText: Human-readable name of the current tender stage.

params._deliveryEvidenceHash: Hash of the delivery note, invoice, or delivery proof.

submitSealedBid(bytes32).details: Bid must be submitted before the deadline and only once.

params._sealedBidHash: keccak256 hash of bid amount and secret.

returns.submissionDeadlineTimestamp: Raw Unix timestamp for the submission deadline.
returns.title: Tender title.

params._newAdmin: Address proposed as the next admin.

returns.winnerAddress: Address of the current winning bidder.
returns.winnerDescription: Description or company name of the current winning bidder.

rejectDelivery(string).notice: Rejects delivery and records the reason.

releasePayment().notice: Releases payment to the winning bidder after inspection acceptance.

setInspector(address).notice: Assigns or updates the inspector address.

status().notice: Returns the current tender status as both enum value and readable text.

submitDeliveryEvidence(bytes32).notice: Allows only the winner to submit delivery evidence.

submitSealedBid(bytes32).notice: Allows a registered bidder to submit a sealed bid hash.

tender().notice: Returns tender details with both raw and human-readable submission deadline fields.

transferAdmin(address).notice: Initiates transfer of admin authority to a new address.

winner().notice: Returns the current winning bidder address and description.

userdoc.notice: A blockchain-based public procurement prototype for transparent tendering, delivery verification, inspection, and conditional payment.
